limitations: V1 ships detector only -- assesses merge velocity, additions, repair density, shared-core touches via git log; WARN-only at substantiate Step 4.6.8; shared-core paths operator-declared (no built-in patterns); offline-safe (no GitHub API)
non_goals: enforcement (hold feature merges, isolate as unmerged branches, require stabilization plan) deferred to V2; GitHub API integration deferred; test-matrix expansion detection deferred; failing-e2e tail-check signal deferred; cross-PR repair-density clustering deferred
exclusions: no changes to /qor-plan; no new CI workflow; no GitHub-API shell calls; existing Step 4.6.5/4.6.6/4.6.7 gates unchanged in order
